Faculty of  Humanities and Social Sciences

Dean's Message

MENU

Prof. Cemal Demircioğlu

Dean

The Faculty of Humanities and Social Sciences comprises Psychology, Sociology, and Translation and Interpreting Programs of English-Turkish, Russian-Turkish, Chinese-Turkish, Arabic-Turkish language pairs. Each program is equipped with a curriculum enabling graduates successful in today's business life, thus making them preferred among other candidates. Furthermore, scientific knowledge and values reinforced with practical studies are one of the faculty's genuine aspects. Therefore, our students graduate with outcomes and skills that assist them in transforming both information and technology into service in line with the needs of society.

Our faculty pays utmost importance to students' introduction to international practices in each field, thus communicating with other cultures for their personal and scholarly development. Therefore, we encourage our students to spend a semester of their education in European universities with Erasmus Programs, providing them with real opportunities and support through international agreements. Additionally, we carry out exchange programs for translation students and students of other fields in cooperation with prestigious universities in Russia, China, and the Arabic world.
